title: How to win the Love Triangle - Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request from Brian De La Cruz, who is in a college love triangle and struggling to prove his feelings to a girl he likes. Kyle offers practical courtship advice — doing favors, offering massages, asking her directly what she wants — while also noting the girl may be manipulative, and sharing opinions on how Latino and Black women engage more with traditional gender competition dynamics than white women.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: love triangle / competing for a woman
stances.position: natural, traditional, and even exciting — men displaying for women is healthy mate selection
possibly manipulative; she may be playing games and enjoying the chase more than genuinely choosing
Latino and Black women are more in touch with traditional pursuit dynamics; white women generally are not
do concrete favors, communicate openly, find out what she wants, but be ready to walk away if she keeps moving the goalposts
good idea — seeing him directly helps you gauge compatibility and understand where you actually stand
